name: v1alpha1SCMProviderGeneratorGithub
description: SCMProviderGeneratorGithub defines connection info specific to GitHub.

allBranches.description: Scan all branches instead of just the default branch.

api.description: The GitHub API URL to talk to. If blank, use https://api.github.com/.

appSecretName.description: AppSecretName is a reference to a GitHub App repo-creds secret.
